#AWS
#OPEN PORTS
ICMP ALL
TCP 22
TCP 80
TCP 443
TCP 8080
TCP 443
TCP 8081
TCP 3000
TCP 8000
ALL 0.0.0.0/0

sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade -y

sudo apt install git htop net-tools wget systemd-timesyncd apt-transport-https zip unzip curl ca-certificates software-properties-common -y

sudo timedatectl set-timezone America/Sao_Paulo

curl -o- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvm-sh/nvm/v0.40.3/install.sh | bash

source ~/.bashrc

nvm install --lts


#COOLIFY
curl -fsSL https://cdn.coollabs.io/coolify/install.sh | sudo bash
